de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.slicing

Class AbstractSlicer.SequentInfo

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.slicing.AbstractSlicer.SequentInfo
  • Enclosing class:
    AbstractSlicer

    protected static class AbstractSlicer.SequentInfo
extends Object
    The result returned by AbstractSlicer#analyzeSequent(Node).
    Author:
    Martin Hentschel
